## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`golangci-lint run ./...`)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private data committed
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (no internal tracking IDs in the title)
